event_description: I have no knowledge of Weis Markets, Inc. (WMK) ever having announced an accounting restatement, an Item 4.02 non-reliance disclosure, a financial-reporting misstatement, an SEC accounting investigation, or a finance-executive departure specifically tied to financial reporting issues. Weis Markets is a Pennsylvania-based supermarket chain, and to the best of my training knowledge it has not been involved in any such publicized accounting or financial-reporting controversy. I am not aware of any such event, and I am not guessing or fabricating one.
